form.formComment: Resuming. Finished off last campaign favourite; won by 0.9 len at Inverell Inv Shorts Bm82 January 1 over 1050m defeating Dis Is Heaven with 53.5kg at $3.20. Resumes with a trial placing and not to be overlooked.
